title: The Dark Truth About ATLANTIS And It's Origins

transcript.text: Plato is the earliest surviving
reference we have to this Great Lost
Civilization of prehistory that he
referred to as Atlantis his Source was
an ancestor of his he didn't know him
personally they were separated by about
200 years but the story had been passed
down in the family line and that
ancestor was a very famous Greek
lawmaker Solon we know that Solon made a
documented visit to Egypt round about
the year 600 BC in our calendar and
Solon went to a Temple dedicated to the
goddess Neath at seis in the Delta and
there the priest showed showed him
certain inscriptions on the walls and he
asked them to interpret and they said
that the what these inscriptions
recounted was a former civilization
which had been highly Advanced but which
was destroyed they said in a single
Dreadful day and night was swallowed up
by the Sea and vanished
